chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-1610 of 2016 C.P.No.D-237 of 2017 C.P.No.D-2342 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 02-10-2017. Mr. Bakhtiar Ahmed Panhwar, Advocate for the petitioner in C.P.No.D-1610 of 2016. Mr. Bharat Kumar, Advocate for petitioner in C.P.No.D-2342 of 2017 Mr. Waseem Jamali, Advocate for petition in C.P.No.D-237 of 2017 Mr. Aurangzeb Talpur, Assistant Attorney General, Iftikhar Ali Assistant Prosecutor F.I.A. Ins: Muhammad Saleem F.I.A Hyderabad Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel. = These are three petitions filed by different petitioners who are young girls and allegedly are being harassed by the proposed accused, who have created their fake I.Ds on the facebook and are sending lewd massages from them. The case of the petitioners is that they have tried their level best for redressal of their grievance and have approached the respondents in this regard, particularly respondent No.2 and 3, who although ensured them for initiating an action against the proposed accused but so far nothing has been done by them. Resultantly the petitioners are facing constant harassment by the proposed accused. Today Mr.Iftikhar Ali (Assistant Prosecutor F.I.A) has appeared, he states that for the investigation of such kind of cases, the petitioners will have to appear in their office at Karachi, as the main server of the computer which is used to collect and save the incriminating data and take screen shots thereof is available there. He has assured that, if the petitioners come tomorrow at their office at about 12:00 midday (noon), their grievances would be attended to by himself and he would ensure that an action in accordance with law is taken against the proposed accused.

Today Mr.Iftikhar Ali (Assistant Prosecutor F.I.A) has appeared, he states that for the investigation of such kind of cases, the petitioners will have to appear in their office at Karachi, as the main server of the computer which is used to collect and save the incriminating data and take screen shots thereof is available there. He has assured that, if the petitioners come tomorrow at their office at about 12:00 midday (noon), their grievances would be attended to by himself and he would ensure that an action in accordance with law is taken against the proposed accused. The petitioners are satisfied to this proposal and seek disposal of the petitions in the said terms. They further state that they will appear at the office of F.I.A at Karachi tomorrow at the given time. Accordingly, these petitions are disposed of in the said terms. The said officer shall attend to the grievance of the petitioners as undertaken by him and submits such compliance report. JUDGE JUDGE Fahad Memon
